frame_analyses.description: Training setup visible with foam pad and circular markings. No instruments present yet.
Two laparoscopic instruments enter the field. Title indicates this is a slip knot demonstration.
Instruments positioned with suture visible. Beginning knot construction with C-loop formation.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper instrument positioning for intracorporeal technique

frame_analyses.description: C-loop formation in progress with text overlay indicating C-loop technique. Red dot marking visible on suture.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear demonstration of C-loop technique with good visualization

frame_analyses.description: Continued C-loop manipulation with instruments working to form the initial throw.
First throw appears complete with instruments positioning for tightening.
First throw being tightened with text overlay 'Unlocking the knot'.
Text indicates 'Sliding the knot' - demonstrating the slip knot mechanism.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear demonstration of knot sliding property

frame_analyses.description: Red line highlighting the locking mechanism with 'Locking the knot' text.
Beginning second throw with C-loop formation indicated by text overlay.
Second throw construction in progress with good instrument coordination.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintained technique quality on second throw

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed knot in center of field. No instruments visible.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean final result with secure-appearing knot

knot_assessments.notes: Well-executed slip knot with clear unlocking and locking demonstration
Good hand alternation and consistent C-loop technique

drain_assessment.assessment_note: This is a knot tying demonstration on foam pad, not Penrose drain closure

technique_summary: Excellent educational demonstration of intracorporeal slip knot technique with clear C-loop formation, proper hand alternation, and good instrument coordination throughout.
improvement_suggestions: Consider demonstrating on actual tissue model for more realistic training
Show suture cutting technique to complete the procedure
strengths: Clear demonstration of slip knot mechanism
